name: Opening the Dubloo project card navigates to its detail page with correct content
description: From the projects listing, clicking the Dubloo project title opens its dedicated detail page with matching content.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Projects' link in the sidebar navigation
Verify the browser navigates to a project detail page at /projects/dubloo
Verify the detail page shows the Dubloo project title and a description mentioning restroom accessibility and interactive sorting and filtering
